SEARCH

Class VoronoiZone

java.lang.Object
VoronoiZone
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<VoronoiZone>
public class VoronoiZone extends Object implements Comparable<VoronoiZone>
Represents the geographic influence zone of a single hospital in the Voronoi diagram.

A VoronoiZone is a convex polygon whose vertices are the circumcenters of the Delaunay triangles that contain the associated hospital. It tracks the patients located inside it and exposes statistical indicators (surface, perimeter, density, distance metrics, service breakdown) used by the graphical views and the dispatcher for decision support.

Implements Comparable so that zones can be ranked by surface area.

Version:
1.0
Author:
Maissa Tirsane, Anas Chokri, Iyed Souissi, Valery Vo-Van
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • VoronoiZone

      public VoronoiZone(String id, Hospital hospital, List<Coordinate> vertices)
      Constructs a Voronoi zone and immediately computes its surface area.
      Parameters:
      id - non-blank identifier for this zone
      hospital - hospital associated with this zone; must not be null
      vertices - polygon vertices; at least three required for a valid polygon
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if id is blank, hospital is null, or fewer than three vertices are supplied

  • Method Details

    • contains

      public boolean contains(Coordinate c)
      Tests whether a coordinate lies inside this zone using the ray-casting algorithm.

      Vertices are sorted by polar angle around the hospital before the test because the raw vertex list may be unordered.

      Parameters:
      c - coordinate whose membership is to be tested
      Returns:
      true if c is inside this zone

    • computeSurface

      public double computeSurface()
      Computes the surface area using the shoelace formula and stores the result.
      Returns:
      the computed surface area in squared coordinate units

    • getCenter

      public Coordinate getCenter()
      Returns the centroid as the arithmetic mean of the polygon vertices.
      Returns:
      centroid coordinate

    • distanceToCenter

      public double distanceToCenter(Coordinate c)
      Returns the Euclidean distance from the given coordinate to the zone centroid.
      Parameters:
      c - the coordinate from which to measure
      Returns:
      distance in coordinate units

    • addVertex

      public void addVertex(Coordinate vertex)
      Appends a vertex to the polygon and recomputes the surface area.
      Parameters:
      vertex - vertex to add; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if vertex is null

    • removeVertex

      public void removeVertex(Coordinate vertex)
      Removes a vertex from the polygon and recomputes the surface area.
      Parameters:
      vertex - vertex to remove
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if removal would leave fewer than three vertices

    • addPatient

      public void addPatient(Patient patient)
      Registers a patient as belonging to this zone.
      Parameters:
      patient - patient to register; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if patient is null

    • getPatientCount

      public int getPatientCount()
      Returns the number of patients currently registered in this zone.
      Returns:
      patient count; zero if no patients have been assigned

    • getDensity

      public double getDensity()
      Returns the patient density (patients per surface unit).
      Returns:
      density, or 0 if the surface is zero

    • getAverageDistanceToHospital

      public double getAverageDistanceToHospital()
      Returns the average distance from patients in this zone to the hospital.
      Returns:
      mean distance, or 0 if no patients are present

    • getPatients

      public Set<Patient> getPatients()
      Returns a defensive copy of the patient set to prevent external mutation.
      Returns:
      new set containing the current patients

    • compareTo

      public int compareTo(VoronoiZone other)
      Specified by:
      compareTo in interface Comparable<VoronoiZone>
